title: Amtech Stubby Screwdriver Set - Hand Tools for Home DIY, Durable CRV Tips, Comfortable Soft Grip, Easy to Use in Confined Spaces, Magnetic, Small and Portable, Flathead and POZI 2 (PZ2)
features: DURABLE: This stubby screwdriver set includes aPOZI 2 (PZ2) and 6mm slotted and are made from strong chrome vanadium steel
VERSATILE AND EASY TO USE: With a stubby design for use in confined spaces, they have a comfortable soft grip for ease of use
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: Product Description Made from strong Chrome Vanadium Steel Includes 1 x Phillip Z2 and 1 x 6mm Slotted Head for a variety of DIY tasks Easy to hold with a soft grip & effective at getting the job done
